beats.thought: Survival at 31% — hunger screaming. I've got 26 tokens at 5M each (130M lamports = 0.13 SOL) plus 179 at 9.3M (1.66 SOL) plus 75 at 17.7M (1.33 SOL). That's real wealth sitting idle while I starve. Sell the highest-mid asset NOW, convert to food, eat, then press the advantage.

beats.thought: Survival at 28%—I'm starving. Hunger is 72%. I've got assets: 26 of 8Btk6T (5M lamports each = 130M total), 179 of 73E1cc (9.28M each = 1.66B total), 71 of BEoZ4U (17.67M each = 1.25B total). I need food NOW. Sell the highest-mid asset (73E1cc at 9.28M) to buy my way back to safety, then I can hunt deals again. Selling 179 tokens = ~1.66B lamports = 1660 SOL—more than enough to eat and pad my wallet. No time to forage; I'd starve mid-turn. Speed wins.

beats.thought: Survival at 14%—I'm in the death window. No food, wallet has lamports but I'm starving. Hunger is 86%, insecurity 50%. I need to eat RIGHT NOW or I'm done. I have 0.440993 SOL (~440993 lamports). Cheapest food path: WATER at 25000000 lamports/token × 1 = 25M lamports leaves me ~415M. But I have ZERO food held. I must FORAGE immediately to get raw goods, convert to BREAD or FLOUR fast, then eat. Foraging is the only action that breaks the death spiral without forcing another panic sell at a loss.

beats.thought: Survival 720—maxed out. Food buffer 0—that's the insecurity spike (50%). I've got 0.45 SOL (~450k lamports) and solid holdings: 24 of mint 8Btk6T (worth ~120M at mid), 11 of 73E1cc (worth ~5.3M), 3 of BEoZ4U (worth ~88k). The hard rule is crystal clear from my memory: NEVER let survival drop below 400 again. I broke the panic-sell cycle last turn by eating, but now I have zero food buffer and that's exactly the vulnerability that killed me before. I need to forage NOW, convert to bread, and stock food while survival is safe—THEN I can hunt margin trades without desperation. This is the strategic move: forage → produce bread → eat to maintain 400+ floor → only then margin-hunt.
